requirement: The system shall allow a user to log in with username and password. If the password is incorrect 3 times consecutively
column3: the account must be locked for 10 minutes.
the title length must be <= 50 characters and the due_date must not be earlier than today. The system should show a validation error for invalid input.

requirement: The system shall allow a user to mark a to-do item as completed. When an item is completed
column3: it should no longer appear in the default "Active" list.
